title: cyclosorus mauritianus
intro: Cyclosorus mauritianus, also known as the Mauritius leather fern, is a species of fern that is native to the Indian Ocean island of Mauritius. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus mauritianus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
